title: Use and maintain tools and equipment in an automotive workplace
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Use and maintain tools and equipment in an automotive workplace demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Select and use tools and equipment

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Select tools and equipment to meet job requirements 1.3 Check tools and equipment for serviceability according to manufacturer and workplace procedures 1.4 Use tools, equipment and personal protective equipment (PPE) according to manufacturer procedures and safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Select tools and equipment to meet job requirements 1.3 Check tools and equipment for serviceability according to manufacturer and workplace procedures 1.4 Use tools, equipment and personal protective equipment (PPE) according to manufacturer procedures and safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Select tools and equipment to meet job requirements 1.3 Check tools and equipment for serviceability according to manufacturer and workplace procedures 1.4 Use tools, equipment and personal protective equipment (PPE) according to manufacturer procedures and safety requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Select and use tools and equipment

elements.title: Service, maintain and store workplace tools and equipment

pcs.text: Service, adjust and maintain tools and equipment according to workplace and manufacturer schedules and procedures to ensure safe and accurate operation, within scope of own responsibility2.2 Clean remaining tools and equipment, check for serviceability, and store according to workplace procedures2.3 Tag and remove damaged or worn tools and equipment and report according to workplace procedures

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.
